lines.english: Sing the Glories of God, the embodiment of supreme bliss.
Join the Company of the Holy, and be happy.
O Nanak, the Lord God unites him with Himself. ||4||
Redeem this human body, so difficult to obtain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਚਨ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: amrit bachan har ke gun gaau |
lines.english: Sing the Ambrosial Words of the Lord's Glorious Praises;
Contemplate the essence of the Lord's Name.
Ignorance shall depart, and darkness shall be dispelled.
this is the way to save your mortal soul.
Behold God near at hand, twenty-four hours a day.
O Nanak, you shall obtain the fruits of your mind's desires. ||5||
Embellish both this world and the next;
Listen to the Teachings, and enshrine them in your heart.
Perfect are the Teachings of the Perfect Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਬਸੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਾਚੁ ਪਰੀਖਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jis man basai tis saach pareekhiaa |
lines.english: That person, within whose mind it abides, realizes the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man tan naam japahu liv laae |
lines.english: With your mind and body, chant the Naam; lovingly attune yourself to it.
enshrine the Lord's Name deep within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਭਉ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dookh darad man te bhau jaae |
lines.english: Sorrow, pain and fear shall depart from your mind.
Deal in the true trade, O trader,
and your merchandise shall be safe in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਤੇ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਹਾ ਕੋ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: tis te door kahaa ko jaae |
lines.english: Where can anyone go, to get away from Him?
Keep the Support of the One in your mind.
O Nanak, you shall not have to come and go in reincarnation again. ||6||
By God's Grace, mortals are released.
Meditating on the Fearless Lord, all fear departs.
Meditating on the Protector Lord, you shall be saved.
Anxiety departs, and ego is eliminated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਰਾਖੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਦੂਖ ॥
lines.translit: jis prabh raakhai tis naahee dookh |
lines.english: One who is protected by God never suffers in pain.
Chanting the Naam, the mind becomes peaceful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਪਹੁਚਨਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis jan kau koe na pahuchanahaar |
lines.english: No one can equal that humble servant.
The Brave and Powerful Guru stands over his head.
O Nanak, his efforts are fulfilled. ||7||
His Lotus Feet are incomparably beautiful.
The Blessed Vision of His Darshan is fruitful and rewarding; His Lordly Form is beautiful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਪੂਰੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ॥
lines.translit: mat pooree amrit jaa kee drisatt |
lines.english: His wisdom is perfect, and His Glance is Ambrosial.
Beholding His Vision, the universe is saved.
Blessed is His service; His servant is famous.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਬਸੈ ਸੁ ਹੋਤ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis man basai su hot nihaal |
lines.english: That one, within whose mind He abides, is blissfully happy.
The Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts, is the most exalted Supreme Being.
One becomes immortal, and obtains the immortal status,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕੈ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਨ ਆਵਤ ਕਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: taa kai nikatt na aavat kaal |
lines.english: Death does not draw near him.
meditating on the Lord, O Nanak, in the Company of the Holy. ||8||22||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਸੰਤ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਿ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har kirapaa te sant bhettiaa naanak man paragaas |1|
lines.english: By the Lord's Grace, I have met the Saint; O Nanak, my mind is enlightened. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਜਨੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਅੰਧੇਰ ਬਿਨਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: giaan anjan gur deea agiaan andher binaas |
lines.english: The Guru has given the healing ointment of spiritual wisdom, and dispelled the darkness of ignorance.
Salok:
Ashtapadee:
In the Society of the Saints, I see God deep within my being.
God's Name is sweet to me.
All things are contained in the Heart of the One,
although they appear in so many various colors.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: nau nidh amrit prabh kaa naam |
lines.english: The nine treasures are in the Ambrosial Name of God.
Within the human body is its place of rest.
The Deepest Samaadhi, and the unstruck sound current of the Naad are there.
The wonder and marvel of it cannot be described.
He alone sees it, unto whom God Himself reveals it.
O Nanak, that humble being understands. ||1||
The Infinite Lord is inside, and outside as well.
In the earth, in the Akaashic ethers, and in the nether regions of the underworld
Deep within each and every heart, the Lord God is pervading.
in all worlds, He is the Perfect Cherisher.
